name: Type 2 Diabetes
generalAdvice: Maintain a low glycemic index diet
ayushAdvice: Consume Jamun seed powder, Karela juice on empty stomach. Practice Mandukasana.

name: Hypertension
ayushAdvice: Drink water stored in copper vessels. Consume Ashwagandha and Arjuna bark decoction.

name: Anemia
generalAdvice: Increase Iron and Vitamin C intake
Avoid taking iron with dairy or calcium
ayushAdvice: Cook in cast iron skillets. Consume Amla, Punarnava, and jaggery with sesame seeds.

name: Thyroid Disorders (Hypothyroidism)
generalAdvice: Take medication on an empty stomach
ayushAdvice: Consume Guggul and Kanchanar. Practice Ujjayi Pranayama daily to stimulate thyroid gland.

name: Asthma
ayushAdvice: Drink warm water with honey and Pippali. Practice deep breathing (Anulom Vilom).

name: PCOS
ayushAdvice: Shatavari and Ashoka herbs help balance hormones. Engage in daily Surya Namaskar.

name: Osteoarthritis
generalAdvice: Maintain healthy weight to reduce joint stress
Engage in low-impact exercises like swimming
ayushAdvice: Apply Mahanarayan oil locally. Consume Shallaki and Curcumin (Turmeric) for inflammation.

name: Insomnia
generalAdvice: Reduce blue light exposure 2 hours before bed
ayushAdvice: Consume warm milk with nutmeg. Take Brahmi and Jatamansi before bed.

name: Acid Peptic Disease (Acidity)
generalAdvice: Avoid spicy, fried foods and caffeine late at night
ayushAdvice: Drink cumin and fennel seed water. Consume Amalaki and Kamadugha Ras.

name: Depression / Anxiety
ayushAdvice: Ashwagandha, Brahmi, and Shankhpushpi are excellent nervine tonics. Practice Shirodhara.
